title: The Drawer Within the Drawer

features.name: the-filing-label
features.desc-on-touch: the nameplate on this drawer; it reads: CONTENTS: One Drawer. You have seen this label before, deeper down

features.name: the-nested-stack
features.desc-on-touch: drawers nested in drawers, each one slightly smaller, each one containing another; the archive sorting itself inside itself

features.name: the-infinite-tower
features.desc-on-touch: you can see down through this drawer into the next one, and down through that, and further; the descent has no bottom that your eye can find

features.name: the-smallest-room
features.desc-on-touch: at the centre of all these drawers, there is a space just large enough for one person to sit and understand what they have found

features.name: the-central-shaft
features.desc-on-touch: the wireframe of the descent; each layer of nesting visible at once; an architecture of recursion made transparent

inscription: you open the drawer to find a drawer; the archive learns that it contains itself

file.name: FileSystem_Root.txt
file.note: directory tree of the nested drawers: /drawer/drawer/drawer/drawer... ERROR: metaphor detected in storage layer — listing does not terminate

reverie.title: REVERIE — where the filing order broke
narr: you kneel before the open drawer. she reaches past
you, her hand deeper than logic allows. the drawer
inside the drawer. inside that drawer. the files
are rearranging themselves around her fingers.
she says nothing. this is where she found the first
corruption. you watch her hand disappear downward.

exits.label: back up into the room that contains this drawer
sideways to a drawer of the same depth, in a parallel recursion
down into the next drawer, smaller, darker, still containing a drawer
